items.title: Bombardier confirme avoir conclu un accord dans le litige avec Honeywell
items.author: N/A
items.description: Bombardier Inc. has reached a settlement agreement to resolve a lawsuit it had filed against Honeywell International Inc. in 2016. The terms of the settlement remain confidential between the two parties.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article does not provide any specific information about Honeywell's stance or the impact of the settlement, so a neutral sentiment is assigned.

items.title: Bombardier Confirms Reaching Settlement in Legal Dispute with Honeywell
items.author: N/A
items.description: Bombardier has reached an agreement to settle its lawsuit against Honeywell that was filed in 2016. The terms of the settlement agreement are confidential to both parties.
